title: Andy Burnham announces he will keep controversial pensions triple lock when he become prime minister
description: PM-in-waiting ruled out an early election, backed a better post-Brexit trade deal with the EU and chose Martin Scorsese’s Goodfellas among his favourite films
content:
Andy Burnham has announced he will keep the controversial pensions triple lock when he becomes prime minister.

title: Huge wildfire rips through Costa Brava as 12,000 people warned to 'stay indoors'
description: A wildfire near the Costa Brava has torn through around 750 hectares of forest, sparking stay-at-home orders for around 12,000 people in several municipalities
content:

title: Why is the UK mired in a maternity and neonatal deaths scandal?
description: An inquiry found that more than 500 mothers and babies either came to harm or died due to poor care.
content:
Two new inquiries have found that substandard care in at least two hospital trusts contributed to a rise in maternal and neonatal deaths in England, UK.

title: Egypt reach World Cup last 16 in shootout as Australia’s goalkeeper gamble backfires
description: Egypt won 4-2 on penalties after a 1-1 draw in Dallas, as Australia switched keepers for the shootout but missed two of their spot-kicks

title: Man arrested in connection with rape of teenage girl at park
description: The 16-year-old was reportedly seriously sexually assaulted in Springburn Park on June 26
content:
A man has been arrested in connection with the alleged rape of a girl in the bushes at a Glasgow park.
The 16-year-old was reportedly seriously sexually assaulted in Springburn Park between 8.30pm and 9.10pm on June 26.
